query: SELECT d.id AS draft_id, d.slug AS draft_slug, d.merge_proposal_similarity AS similarity FROM skill_drafts d JOIN skills s ON s.id = d.merge_proposal_skill_id AND s.tenant_id = $1 WHERE d.tenant_id = $1 AND d.status = 'pending' AND s.slug = $2 ORDER BY d.merge_proposal_similarity DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10
